name: IP Adapter / FaceID
description: Built-in Image Reference extension migrated from V1 IPAdapter/FaceID behavior with sequential units, multi-reference batching, route-aware payload validation, Comfy node gating, workflow graph patching, output metadata, and replay readiness.

notes: V1 source supports SDXL/SD checkpoint workflows. Outpaint remains planned until an exact route-specific patch is validated.
Marked experimental because V1 grouped SDXL/SD together while V2 distinguishes SD 1.5 routes.

fields.label: Mode
fields.help_text: Standard transfers visual reference/style. FaceID locks identity using IPAdapter Plus FaceID nodes.

fields.label: FaceID model
fields.help_text: With the unified FaceID loader, this file is validated against the selected preset and checkpoint family before Comfy resolves the canonical model.

workflow_patch_contract.graph_mutation: MODEL-in/MODEL-out IPAdapter nodes inserted before sampler model input
